name: Tool List
description: Dense two-column list of tools or features with monospace names and muted descriptions. CLI-style layout with colored dot bullets and a colored left border accent per item. Each item gets a unique color from a rotating palette. Hover highlights the row background. Pure text layout with no component dependencies.

standard.description: Two-column grid of tool items with no gap between rows. Each item has: a 4px colored left border accent, a colored dot bullet (6px circle), a monospace tool name in the item's accent color, and a muted description below. Items have subtle bottom borders and a semi-transparent background that brightens on hover. Colors rotate through coral, amber, cyan, green, yellow, orange, purple, pink, crimson. Layout: 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile.

slots.tool-name: Tool name displayed in monospace font with _mono _fs[0.82rem] _fw600 _mb1. Includes a colored dot bullet (6px circle, inline-block, flex-shrink-0) before the name. Both the dot and name text use the item's accent color from the rotation palette. Wrapped in a _flex _items[center] _gap2 container.
slots.tool-description: Tool description with _fs[0.82rem] _fgmuted _lh[1.4]. Brief one-line description of the tool's purpose.

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

compact.description: Single-column layout with denser spacing. Same colored dot bullets and monospace names, but items are stacked in a single column for narrower containers or longer lists. Reduced padding for a more compact feel.

slots.tool-name: Monospace tool name with colored dot bullet, _mono _fs[0.8rem] _fw600. Color from rotating palette.

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

slots.tool-name: Monospace name with colored dot bullet
